author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

DAC Platform v0 - Out Now

 Calling all DACs (Guilds) 

Jump into on-chain creation, customization, and management of your DAC with v0 of the Star Atlas DAC Platform! 

Future updates will include treasury and permissions management, Player Profiles, and more!

Learn more: https://medium.com/star-atlas/the-rise-of-corporations-star-atlas-launches-dac-platform-v0-b6eb60df626a

 Create your DAC now: https://play.staratlas.com/
